changeSet.author: system
system
system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_checklist_items ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES audits(id), section VARCHAR(200), requirement_reference VARCHAR(400), question TEXT NOT NULL, expected_evidence TEXT, checklist_method VARCHAR(30), responsible_auditor_id BIGINT, applicable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, response VARCHAR(30), evidence_summary TEXT, finding_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, linked_finding_id BIGINT REFERENCES audit_findings(id), comments TEXT, sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_checklist_audit_id ON audit_checklist_items(audit_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_evidence ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES audits(id), evidence_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, reference_number VARCHAR(100), area_audited VARCHAR(200), person_interviewed VARCHAR(200), records_reviewed TEXT, related_checklist_item_id BIGINT REFERENCES audit_checklist_items(id), related_finding_id BIGINT REFERENCES audit_findings(id), auditor_notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_evidence_audit_id ON audit_evidence(audit_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_action_plans ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES audits(id), finding_id BIGINT REFERENCES audit_findings(id), action_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, root_cause_analysis TEXT, action_owner_id BIGINT, due_date DATE, priority VARCHAR(20), status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_STARTED', completion_evidence TEXT, completed_by_id BIGINT, completion_date DATE, verified_by_id BIGINT, verification_date DATE, effectiveness_check_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, effectiveness_check_date DATE, effectiveness_result VARCHAR(30), comments TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_action_plans_audit_id ON audit_action_plans(audit_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_meetings ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES audits(id), meeting_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, meeting_date_time TIMESTAMPTZ, attendees TEXT, agenda TEXT, discussion_summary TEXT, key_decisions TEXT, agreed_actions TEXT, minutes_approved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, approved_by_id BIGINT, approval_date DATE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_meetings_audit_id ON audit_meetings(audit_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_linked_records ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES audits(id), record_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, record_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, record_reference VARCHAR(200), record_title VARCHAR(400), record_status VARCHAR(100), notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, UNIQUE(audit_id, record_type, record_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_linked_records_audit_id ON audit_linked_records(audit_id);
